content: By integrating 2024-2025 SOTA curiosity-driven active learning into 2025 retrieval-augmented agent memory architectures, agents can proactively prioritize sampling and storing under-represented, high-uncertainty memory chunks instead of passively retrieving only contextually relevant existing entries. This creates a self-improving memory loop where active selection of new memory content directly reduces retrieval gaps that cause out-of-context errors in long-horizon agent tasks.
